name: Chocolate Coconut Crunchers
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pillsbury Plus German chocolate cake mix
1 cup cornflakes; crushed, or other cereal flakes
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by Pillsbury 36th Bake-Off (1994)
Preparation time: 40 minutes
Cooking time: 8 to 12 minutes Yield: 4 to 5 dozen cookies
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, butter or margarine, and eggs. Mix well.
3. Add coconut, walnuts, cornflakes, rolled oats, and chocolate chips. Mix well.
4. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Flatten each scoop with a glass dipped in sugar.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 8 to 12 minutes, or until set.
7. Let cool for 1 minute before removing from the cookie sheets.
